# setImage(_:imageProperties:)

**Instance Method**

Sets an image with the specified properties.

## Declaration

```swift
func setImage(_ image: CGImage!, imageProperties metaData: [AnyHashable : Any]!)
```

## Discussion

Your data source must implement this method.

## Related Documentation

- **IKImageEditPanelDataSource**: The `IKImageEditPanelDataSource` protocol describes the methods that an [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/IKImageEditPanel] object uses to access the contents of its data source object.

## Getting and Setting Image Properties

- **imageProperties**: Returns a dictionary of the image properties associated with the image in the image edit panel.
